positive: A minimalist, geometric portrait of a vibrant, stylized phoenix rising from crystalline stardust. The phoenix should be composed of bold, contrasting silhouettes of fiery feathers and sharp, flowing curves. Its wings spread dramatically in a central, symmetrical composition, forming a sense of upward motion and rebirth. Use a palette of deep sapphire blues, burnt oranges, and electric golds against a solid, slightly textured cream or black background. High contrast, vector-art aesthetic, clean lines, perfect symmetry, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Studio lighting, vibrant colors, graphic design quality.
